summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Stock Dashboard Cross-Filtering feature. All 17 backend tests pass (100%). Frontend UI testing verified: Cross-filter by MODELO (click row → filter chip + KPI updates), Cross-filter by TALLA (click column header → amber highlight + filter), Toggle filters (Es LQ, Es Negro), Slicer popovers (Tienda, Marca, etc), Filter chips with 'X' remove buttons, 'Limpiar todo' clear all button, Detalle de Stock expandable section.

issues: HTML hydration warnings about <span> inside <tr>/<tbody>/<th> - cosmetic React warning, does not affect functionality

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/stock-dashboard/filters returns all filter types (tienda_canonicas, marcas, tipos, entalles, telas, tallas, colores)
Backend: GET /api/stock-dashboard/filters returns correct canonical tiendas (ALMACEN, BOOSH, GAMARRA 207, GAMARRA 209, GM218, GRAU 238 / GRAU 55)
Backend: GET /api/stock-dashboard/filters tallas are sorted correctly (S < M < L)
Backend: GET /api/stock-dashboard/panels returns all 7 stores + KPIs (44,229 stock, 879 modelos)
Backend: Cross-filter by modelo=CLASIC → stock drops to 837, modelos=2
Backend: Cross-filter by talla=M → stock drops to 3,992
Backend: Cross-filter by es_negro=si → stock drops to 16,832
Backend: Cross-filter by es_lq=si → stock drops to 1,464
Backend: Multiple filters combine correctly (modelo+talla filters together)
Backend: Store structure has Color x Talla matrix with colores, matrix, totals (byColor, bySize, grandTotal)
Backend: GET /api/stock-dashboard/modelo-talla returns 879 total_modelos
Backend: modelo-talla row structure has modelo, cells, total
Backend: modelo-talla crossfilter by modelo=CLASIC returns 2 modelos, 837 grand_total
Backend: GET /api/stock-dashboard/detalle returns paginated items
Backend: detalle item structure has tienda, modelo, talla, color, available_qty
Backend: detalle crossfilter by modelo filters correctly
Backend: detalle pagination works (page 1 ≠ page 2)
Frontend: Dashboard loads at /stock-dashboard with all 7 panels visible
Frontend: Dark filter bar (bg-slate-900) at top with KPIs
Frontend: Cross-filter by MODELO - click CLASIC → filter chip 'Modelo: CLASIC' appears, KPIs update to 837 stock, 2 modelos
Frontend: Cross-filter by TALLA - click M column header → amber highlight, filter chip 'Talla: M' appears, KPIs update to 3,992
Frontend: Toggle filter Es Negro - cycles through Todas/Si/No, green when Si, red when No, KPIs update to 16,832 with Si
Frontend: Slicer popover (Tienda) - opens with checkboxes for all 6 canonical tiendas + search box
Frontend: Filter chips display with 'X' remove buttons
Frontend: 'Limpiar todo' button clears all filters
Frontend: Detalle de Stock expandable section works
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: Console warnings about HTML elements (<span> in <tr>/<tbody>) appear in React - these are cosmetic hydration warnings from the visual editor spans injected at runtime, not actual code issues. They don't affect functionality.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Stock Dashboard Cross-Filtering fully functional. All click interactions (modelo, talla, color, cells) trigger filter updates with 300ms debounce. Backend accepts comma-separated filter values (e.g., talla=S,M,L). Reference KPI values: Unfiltered=44,229 stock, CLASIC filter=837, M filter=3,992, es_negro=si=16,832, es_lq=si=1,464. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_stock_dashboard_crossfilter.py covers all filter endpoints with 17 passing tests.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A - No issues found. Cross-filtering feature implemented correctly.
